title: tf.expand_dims  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Returns a tensor with a length 1 axis inserted at indexaxis.
Given a tensorinput, this operation inserts a dimension of length 1 at the
dimension indexaxisofinput's shape. The dimension index follows Python
indexing rules: It's zero-based, a negative index it is counted backward
from the end.
This operation is useful to:
